violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Door to walk-in cooler is an old fashioned, heavy, solid wood door. Built to last and hard to find. Needs a good push to fully close. Could use some new gaskets and a little repair. - Paper towel dispenser above handwashing sink is able to dispense towels but has a broken piece missing from front of box. Replacement dispenser has been purchased and waiting to be hung.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors, walls, and ceiling in kitchen could use a thorough cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - A hole is on one of the server/swing doors. - Minor scratches/dings on walls around kitchen could use a touch up.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
